home.title: A reliable representative of foreign manufacturers in Kazakhstan and the EAEU
home.lead: We represent the interests of foreign manufacturers before government authorities and conformity assessment bodies. We support conformity confirmation of products with the EAEU technical regulations — from consultation to full project management.

why.title: Why clients choose us
items: A professional team of experts in technical regulation and conformity assessment.
Hands-on experience supporting domestic and foreign manufacturers.
A comprehensive approach — from consultation to full project support.
An individual approach to every client.
Efficiency, confidentiality and compliance with legal requirements.

services.title: Our services
items: Representing foreign manufacturers in Kazakhstan and the EAEU
Conformity assessment against EAEU technical regulations
Support for declarations and certificates of conformity
Liaison with certification bodies and laboratories
Advice on technical regulation and EAC marking
Storage and provision of conformity documentation

cta.title: Let's work together
cta.text: If you are a foreign manufacturer, supplier or importer of products, we are ready to become your reliable representative in the Republic of Kazakhstan and the EAEU.

about.title: An authorised representative of manufacturers since 2007
about.lead: Eurasian Consulting Consortium LLP was registered as a legal entity on 26 January 2007 and operates in the field of technical regulation, conformity assessment and accreditation.
paragraphs: Since its foundation, Eurasian Consulting Consortium LLP has conducted commercial activities in technical regulation, conformity assessment and accreditation.

The company is a founder of the Association of Legal Entities "Kazakhstan Association of Conformity Assessment Bodies", which enables cooperation with all certification bodies of the Republic of Kazakhstan.
directions: Advisory and methodological support in setting up laboratories and conformity assessment bodies, with subsequent support during accreditation.
Advisory and methodological support in confirming product conformity with national legislation and the Eurasian Economic Union requirements.
about.record: Over the years, Eurasian Consulting Consortium LLP has served both Kazakhstani and foreign companies at a high professional level without receiving a single complaint. The company currently maintains long-term contracts with a number of companies listed in the "Partners" section.

services.title: Our services
services.lead: Within the requirements of the legislation of the Republic of Kazakhstan and the Eurasian Economic Union, we provide a full range of services for confirming product conformity.

legislation.title: Legislation and technical regulation
legislation.lead: Legal regulation of technical regulation, conformity assessment, accreditation and uniformity of measurements in the Republic of Kazakhstan is based on national legislation, international treaties and the law of the Eurasian Economic Union.
legislation.intro: The main purpose of regulation is to ensure product safety, protect the life and health of citizens, the environment and property, and create conditions for the free circulation of products in the market of the Republic of Kazakhstan and the EAEU member states.

laws.title: Law of the RK "On Technical Regulation"
laws.description: Establishes the legal framework of the state technical regulation system, requirements for products and production processes, conformity assessment, state control and supervision. It defines the concept and powers of the authorised representative of the manufacturer.

laws.title: Law of the RK "On Ensuring Uniformity of Measurements"
laws.description: Regulates relations in metrology and sets requirements for measuring instruments, verification, calibration and state metrological control, ensuring the reliability of measurement results.

laws.title: Law of the RK "On Accreditation in Conformity Assessment"
laws.description: Regulates relations arising in the accreditation of conformity assessment bodies and defines the legal, organisational and economic framework of the national accreditation system.

legislation.adiletNote: Current versions of the laws are available in the Information and Legal System of Regulatory Legal Acts of the Republic of Kazakhstan.
legislation.eaeuTitle: Law of the Eurasian Economic Union
legislation.eaeuLead: Alongside national legislation, the following apply:
eaeuItems: the Treaty on the Eurasian Economic Union;
the technical regulations of the Eurasian Economic Union (EAEU TR);
the decisions of the Eurasian Economic Commission;
interstate standards ensuring compliance with the technical regulations.
legislation.eaeuNote: Information on the legal framework of the Eurasian Economic Union is available on the official website of the Eurasian Economic Commission.

partners.title: Trusted by partners from 4 countries
partners.lead: Eurasian Consulting Consortium LLP maintains long-term contracts with manufacturers and conformity assessment bodies in the USA, the European Union, Canada and the Republic of Kazakhstan.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.lead: If you are looking for a reliable representative in the Republic of Kazakhstan and the EAEU, send us a request and we will get back to you shortly.
